scripts.test:check:correct-handle-syntax-error: eslint . | grep -q "26:16  error  Parsing error: × Expected ',', got '<eof>'"
scripts.test:check:only-one-error: eslint --format compact .  | egrep '^[0-9]+ problem[s]*' | wc -l | grep -q 1
scripts.test:fix: eslint --fix --format compact . | egrep '^[0-9]+ problem[s]*' | wc -l | grep -q 1
